events.preview: First negative day. Two **overconfidence misses on base-rate favorites**: Nipah→West Bengal (I had Kerala 0.70!) -33.6, Iran province→Isfahan (I had Sistan 0.40) -19.3. Thailand PM→Natthaphong (0.22) +32.2 partly offset.

blocks.text:
First negative day. Two **overconfidence misses on base-rate favorites**: Nipah→West Bengal (I had Kerala 0.70!) -33.6, Iran province→Isfahan (I had Sistan 0.40) -19.3. Thailand PM→Natthaphong (0.22) +32.2 partly offset. TW dipped to **622.42**.

**Critical calibration refinement**: distinguish *current-evidence* favorites (Bangladesh→Sri Lanka, Board of Peace, Thailand polls — go high) from *base-rate-only* favorites (Nipah usually Kerala, protests usually Sistan — keep ≤0.45, the specific event may differ). Kerala 0.70 had no current confirmation. Let me record this and trim a couple of base-rate-heavy positions.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-02-36-11/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace
cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 17 (Jan 10) — FIRST NEG DAY, TW=622.42 (-20)
RESOLVED: Nipah->WEST BENGAL (I had Kerala 0.70!!, -33.6); IranProvince->ISFAHAN (I had Sistan 0.40, -19.3); ThaiPM->Natthaphong(0.22,+32.2).
**KEY CALIBRATION RULE (refined)**: 
- HIGH confidence (0.5-0.65) ONLY with CURRENT/specific evidence (Bangladesh->SriLanka, Board of Peace, current polls, bracket logic).
- MODERATE (<=0.45) for BASE-RATE-only favorites (Nipah-usually-Kerala, protests-usually-Sistan). The specific event often differs from historical norm! Kerala 0.70 & Sistan 0.40 were base-rate bets w/o current confirmation = overconfident.
- Trimmed 348570 ManCity 0.52, 207522 Sulawesi 0.55 (base-rate-ish).
EOF
echo done
